infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: NoFine uses your location to detect when you enter charge zones and send payment reminders.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: NoFine needs background location to detect charge zones even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NoFine uses your location to show nearby charge zones.
